commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bf0e07b96f1480353c37e6af20f4cd4bdf28aa8b)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a copied Crabbox skill, Crabbox config, a manual hydrate workflow, CODEOWNERS/actionlint updates, and package scripts for Crabbox commands.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the added skill references `scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs` and `.github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml`, while current main lacks both. I did not run a live Crabbox lease.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer review should decide whether this PR should adapt the copied OpenClaw skill for ClawSweeper or add the missing wrapper/workflow before merge.

target.title: chore: add constrained Crabbox setup
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds the exact Crabbox skill copied from `openclaw/openclaw`.
- Adds constrained Crabbox config and hydrate workflow with repo-specific self-hosted runner labels.
- Adds CODEOWNERS for automation/package surfaces, actionlint runner labels, and package scripts for the copied skill command surface.

This is the narrowed replacement shape for the earlier broad setup baseline. It intentionally does not add CodeQL, stale automation, licensing changes, Dependabot, or unrelated policy defaults.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- Ruby YAML parse for `.crabbox.yaml`, `.github/actionlint.yaml`, and `.github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml`
- `actionlint -config-file .github/actionlint.yaml .github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml`
- Crabbox skill SHA-256 matched `openclaw/openclaw`: `ed512c0b0385fae7f6c5c14a7e9e6236ab68936506687a99ca976873492bdc43`
- Package script presence check for `check:changed`, `test:changed`, and `crabbox:*`
- Private-path scan for new public files
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check package.json .github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml .github/actionlint.yaml` was attempted after formatting `package.json`, but that would reindent the whole file to tabs. I kept the package diff surgical instead.
- `pnpm run format:check` was also attempted and failed on 181 pre-existing repo-wide format issues, so it is not useful proof for this setup-only diff.

## Notes

No live Crabbox lease was started for this setup-only patch.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
